semantic.role: Vitest integration test suite for MCP context modes, validating resource and tool access control under different initialization states.
responsibilities: Sets up isolated temporary directories for each test case to simulate project environments.
Tests MCPContextGate behavior for restricting resource and tool access based on initialization state.
Validates that SpineResources and SpineTools respect context gating policies.
Provides test lifecycle management (beforeEach/afterEach) for clean environment setup and teardown.
outOfScope: Production runtime logic for MCP context gating.
Implementation of the MCP protocol server or client.
invariants: Must be a Vitest test file (.test.ts suffix).
Must import and test MCPContextGate, SpineResources, and SpineTools.
Must manage temporary test directories to avoid side effects.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Ensure MCP context gating is rigorously tested to prevent unauthorized resource or tool access in the ArchSpine system.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Part of final release preparation (v1.0.0), likely ensuring test suite stability and coverage.
